title: Command Cockpit Territory Board
summary: Turned the Command Cockpit lane rail into a compact two-column territory board so expanding money paths scan more like map nodes and less like a long report list.
changes: Added active-lane index and lane-count CSS variables to the rendered lane rail.
Added a cockpit-only territory route layer with route line, animated runner, and per-lane nodes.
Reshaped desktop cockpit lane cards into a dense two-column territory board while preserving existing lane data and controls.
Kept the mobile cockpit lane picker as a compact horizontal strip so the phone layout stays fast and low-scroll.
Recorded the territory board as the latest platform UI unlock in the generated snapshot history.
